title: ContentService.addStatusChangeListener 零权限同步状态监听
notes: addStatusChangeListener(mask, observer) has no READ_SYNC_STATS or READ_SYNC_SETTINGS permission check. Compare with getCurrentSyncsAsUser (requires READ_SYNC_STATS) and getSyncAutomaticallyAsUser (requires READ_SYNC_SETTINGS). Any app can monitor global sync state changes for user profiling.
